title: Coatings for Pool Decks - Elite South Texas
content:
Pool Decks
Our specialty coatings for pool decks provide surfaces that are durable, easy to maintain and offer slip resistant properties even when wet. These resurfacing products are made to be applied to new or existing concrete, as a surface repair or decorative finish. They are resistant to pool chemicals, staining and saltwater degradation. Our surfaces are resistant to direct ultraviolet rays from the sun, as well as harsh freeze/thaw conditions.
Advantages
Pool chemical, stain and saltwater resistant
Slip resistant even when wet
UV stable and resistant to freeze/thaw conditions
Engineered as surface repair with decorative options
Surfaces for new or existing construction
Easy to maintain
Non-porous, antimicrobial and antibacterial
Options for interior and exterior pool decks
Cost effective compared to stamped concrete, pre-cast and placed systems
Increased durability, surface protection and aesthetics for concrete surfaces
Polymer Modified Cement
Brochure
SYPP™
